sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33937" key="e)mbaba/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβᾰβάζω</orth>, <sense id="n33937.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">interrupt</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐμβαβάξαντες</foreign> prob. l. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐμβιβ-</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
